name: Budweiser 6pk Bott
tastingNotes: Known historically as the "King of Beers," this iconic American lager is brewed with a blend of premium aroma hop varieties and a signature rice adjunct for a crisp, clean profile. It delivers a subtle honeyed malt sweetness balanced by a mild, floral hop bitterness that finishes brilliantly refreshing.
description: Known historically as the "King of Beers," this iconic American lager is brewed with a blend of premium aroma hop varieties and a signature rice adjunct for a crisp, clean profile. It delivers a subtle honeyed malt sweetness balanced by a mild, floral hop bitterness that finishes brilliantly refreshing.

name: Presidential 10 Yr Tawny Port
tastingNotes: Matured for a decade in seasoned oak casks within the cellars of Vila Nova de Gaia, this elegant fortified wine exhibits a beautiful amber-tawny hue. The palate is graced with complex layers of dried figs, toasted almonds, and butterscotch, culminating in a harmonious, persistent finish.
description: Matured for a decade in seasoned oak casks within the cellars of Vila Nova de Gaia, this elegant fortified wine exhibits a beautiful amber-tawny hue. The palate is graced with complex layers of dried figs, toasted almonds, and butterscotch, culminating in a harmonious, persistent finish.

name: Bud Light 6pk Bott
tastingNotes: Introduced in 1982 to redefine the light beer category, this highly attenuated brew utilizes a blend of two-row and six-row malted barley alongside rice. It presents an exceptionally light body with faint cereal notes and a whisper of hops, concluding with a rapid, thirst-quenching finish.
description: Introduced in 1982 to redefine the light beer category, this highly attenuated brew utilizes a blend of two-row and six-row malted barley alongside rice. It presents an exceptionally light body with faint cereal notes and a whisper of hops, concluding with a rapid, thirst-quenching finish.

name: Bud Light 12 Pck Bott
tastingNotes: Introduced in 1982 to redefine the light beer category, this highly attenuated brew utilizes a blend of two-row and six-row malted barley alongside rice. It presents an exceptionally light body with faint cereal notes and a whisper of hops, concluding with a rapid, thirst-quenching finish.
description: Introduced in 1982 to redefine the light beer category, this highly attenuated brew utilizes a blend of two-row and six-row malted barley alongside rice. It presents an exceptionally light body with faint cereal notes and a whisper of hops, concluding with a rapid, thirst-quenching finish.

name: H W Blue Curacao
tastingNotes: Inspired by the historic liqueurs of the Dutch Caribbean, this vibrantly hued spirit derives its core flavor from the dried peels of the Laraha citrus fruit. It offers a sweet, zesty orange profile with a moderately viscous mouthfeel, making it an essential modifier for visually striking craft cocktails.
description: Inspired by the historic liqueurs of the Dutch Caribbean, this vibrantly hued spirit derives its core flavor from the dried peels of the Laraha citrus fruit. It offers a sweet, zesty orange profile with a moderately viscous mouthfeel, making it an essential modifier for visually striking craft cocktails.

name: Opici Chianti
tastingNotes: Rooted in the storied winemaking traditions of Tuscany, this quintessential Italian red is crafted primarily from the noble Sangiovese grape. It bursts with bright aromas of tart red cherries and dried herbs, supported by a backbone of vibrant acidity and supple tannins that make it exceptionally food-friendly.
description: Rooted in the storied winemaking traditions of Tuscany, this quintessential Italian red is crafted primarily from the noble Sangiovese grape. It bursts with bright aromas of tart red cherries and dried herbs, supported by a backbone of vibrant acidity and supple tannins that make it exceptionally food-friendly.

name: Coors Light 12 Pck Can
tastingNotes: Born in the Rocky Mountains and cold-lagered for enhanced crispness, this iconic light beer is brewed with pure water and Moravian barley. It delivers an extremely clean, subtle malt sweetness with a nearly imperceptible hop presence, designed to be consumed at frost-level temperatures for maximum refreshment.
description: Born in the Rocky Mountains and cold-lagered for enhanced crispness, this iconic light beer is brewed with pure water and Moravian barley. It delivers an extremely clean, subtle malt sweetness with a nearly imperceptible hop presence, designed to be consumed at frost-level temperatures for maximum refreshment.

name: Patron Anejo
tastingNotes: Handcrafted in Jalisco, Mexico, this premium spirit is distilled in small batches and aged for over twelve months in a combination of French oak, Hungarian oak, and used American whiskey barrels. The resulting elixir showcases a sophisticated bouquet of warm vanilla, baked agave, and toasted caramel, finishing with a lingering, peppery spice.
description: Handcrafted in Jalisco, Mexico, this premium spirit is distilled in small batches and aged for over twelve months in a combination of French oak, Hungarian oak, and used American whiskey barrels. The resulting elixir showcases a sophisticated bouquet of warm vanilla, baked agave, and toasted caramel, finishing with a lingering, peppery spice.

name: Taylor Lake Country White
tastingNotes: Hailing from the historic Finger Lakes region of New York, this approachable heritage blend showcases the charming character of native American grape varieties. It features a soft, semi-sweet palate brimming with juicy orchard fruits and a gentle floral bouquet, delivering a smooth, easy-drinking finish.
description: Hailing from the historic Finger Lakes region of New York, this approachable heritage blend showcases the charming character of native American grape varieties. It features a soft, semi-sweet palate brimming with juicy orchard fruits and a gentle floral bouquet, delivering a smooth, easy-drinking finish.

name: High Life 6 Pk Btl
tastingNotes: Dubbed the "Champagne of Beers" since its debut in 1903, this classic American lager is renowned for its high carbonation and brilliantly clear golden color. It offers a proprietary blend of malted barley and Pacific Northwest hops, yielding a mildly sweet, bready core with a crisp, effervescent bite.
description: Dubbed the "Champagne of Beers" since its debut in 1903, this classic American lager is renowned for its high carbonation and brilliantly clear golden color. It offers a proprietary blend of malted barley and Pacific Northwest hops, yielding a mildly sweet, bready core with a crisp, effervescent bite.

name: Casal Garcia Vinho Verde
tastingNotes: Cultivated in the lush, verdant northwest of Portugal, this classic blend of Trajadura, Loureiro, Arinto, and Azal captures the vibrant essence of the Minho region. It is delightfully effervescent and light-bodied, bursting with zesty notes of green apple, citrus blossom, and a distinctly crisp, mineral-driven acidity.
description: Cultivated in the lush, verdant northwest of Portugal, this classic blend of Trajadura, Loureiro, Arinto, and Azal captures the vibrant essence of the Minho region. It is delightfully effervescent and light-bodied, bursting with zesty notes of green apple, citrus blossom, and a distinctly crisp, mineral-driven acidity.

name: Miller Lite 12 Pck Bott
tastingNotes: Pioneering the modern light beer movement in 1975, this brew is crafted with a proprietary malt blend and Galena hops for a true pilsner character. It maintains a surprisingly robust malt backbone for its class, highlighted by a subtle toasted cereal note and a clean, refreshing, dry finish.
description: Pioneering the modern light beer movement in 1975, this brew is crafted with a proprietary malt blend and Galena hops for a true pilsner character. It maintains a surprisingly robust malt backbone for its class, highlighted by a subtle toasted cereal note and a clean, refreshing, dry finish.

name: Absolut Citron 12
tastingNotes: Crafted in Åhus, Sweden from winter wheat and pristine well water, this pioneering flavored vodka sparked the Cosmopolitan craze of the 1990s. It imparts a bright, authentic lemon zest aroma coupled with a subtle hint of lime, delivering a smooth, crisp palate with no added sugar.
description: Crafted in Åhus, Sweden from winter wheat and pristine well water, this pioneering flavored vodka sparked the Cosmopolitan craze of the 1990s. It imparts a bright, authentic lemon zest aroma coupled with a subtle hint of lime, delivering a smooth, crisp palate with no added sugar.

name: Corona 12pk Can
tastingNotes: First brewed in Mexico City in 1925, this ubiquitous sun-drenched lager has become synonymous with beachside relaxation globally. It presents a light, straw-yellow hue with delicate aromas of sweet malt and a touch of noble hops, finishing with a clean, dry crispness that begs for a fresh lime wedge.
description: First brewed in Mexico City in 1925, this ubiquitous sun-drenched lager has become synonymous with beachside relaxation globally. It presents a light, straw-yellow hue with delicate aromas of sweet malt and a touch of noble hops, finishing with a clean, dry crispness that begs for a fresh lime wedge.

name: Rolling Rock 12 Pck Bott
tastingNotes: Brewed originally in the glass-lined tanks of Old Latrobe, this American lager offers a crisp, clean profile with subtle hints of sweet grain. Its gentle carbonation and mild hop bitterness make it an exceptionally approachable and refreshing choice for casual enjoyment.
description: Brewed originally in the glass-lined tanks of Old Latrobe, this American lager offers a crisp, clean profile with subtle hints of sweet grain. Its gentle carbonation and mild hop bitterness make it an exceptionally approachable and refreshing choice for casual enjoyment.

name: Amstel Light 12 Pck Bott
tastingNotes: Originating from Amsterdam and brewed with a unique blend of barley and hops, this light lager delivers a balanced, gently toasted malt character. It finishes with a clean, mild bitterness that belies its remarkably low caloric profile.
description: Originating from Amsterdam and brewed with a unique blend of barley and hops, this light lager delivers a balanced, gently toasted malt character. It finishes with a clean, mild bitterness that belies its remarkably low caloric profile.

name: Amstel Light 6pk Bott
tastingNotes: Originating from Amsterdam and brewed with a unique blend of barley and hops, this light lager delivers a balanced, gently toasted malt character. It finishes with a clean, mild bitterness that belies its remarkably low caloric profile.
description: Originating from Amsterdam and brewed with a unique blend of barley and hops, this light lager delivers a balanced, gently toasted malt character. It finishes with a clean, mild bitterness that belies its remarkably low caloric profile.

name: Salignac Cognac V S
tastingNotes: Rooted in the storied terroir of the Charente region, this youthful Cognac presents an inviting bouquet of fresh orchard fruits, delicate vanilla, and warm oak. Its smooth, accessible palate finishes with a touch of lively spice, making it equally adept for neat sipping or elevating classic cocktails.
description: Rooted in the storied terroir of the Charente region, this youthful Cognac presents an inviting bouquet of fresh orchard fruits, delicate vanilla, and warm oak. Its smooth, accessible palate finishes with a touch of lively spice, making it equally adept for neat sipping or elevating classic cocktails.

name: Masciarelli Montepulciano
tastingNotes: Cultivated in the rugged, sun-drenched vineyards of Abruzzo, this robust Italian red exudes dark cherry, ripe plum, and subtle earthy spices. Its structured tannins and vibrant acidity provide a beautifully rustic yet elegant palate that perfectly complements hearty Mediterranean cuisine.
description: Cultivated in the rugged, sun-drenched vineyards of Abruzzo, this robust Italian red exudes dark cherry, ripe plum, and subtle earthy spices. Its structured tannins and vibrant acidity provide a beautifully rustic yet elegant palate that perfectly complements hearty Mediterranean cuisine.

name: Becks 12 Pks Bott
tastingNotes: Adhering strictly to the German Reinheitsgebot of 1516, this iconic Bremen-born pilsner is distinguished by its crisp, unmistakable Noble hop bite. It pours a brilliant gold, offering a dry, refreshing palate with a lingering, elegantly bitter finish.
description: Adhering strictly to the German Reinheitsgebot of 1516, this iconic Bremen-born pilsner is distinguished by its crisp, unmistakable Noble hop bite. It pours a brilliant gold, offering a dry, refreshing palate with a lingering, elegantly bitter finish.

name: Becks 6 Pk Bott
tastingNotes: Adhering strictly to the German Reinheitsgebot of 1516, this iconic Bremen-born pilsner is distinguished by its crisp, unmistakable Noble hop bite. It pours a brilliant gold, offering a dry, refreshing palate with a lingering, elegantly bitter finish.
description: Adhering strictly to the German Reinheitsgebot of 1516, this iconic Bremen-born pilsner is distinguished by its crisp, unmistakable Noble hop bite. It pours a brilliant gold, offering a dry, refreshing palate with a lingering, elegantly bitter finish.

name: Corona Extra 12 Pks Bott
tastingNotes: Born in Mexico City in 1925, this ubiquitous pale lager presents a famously light, sun-kissed profile with whispers of sweet corn and cereal. It demands to be served ice-cold, ideally with a squeeze of fresh lime to accentuate its crisp, thirst-quenching simplicity.
description: Born in Mexico City in 1925, this ubiquitous pale lager presents a famously light, sun-kissed profile with whispers of sweet corn and cereal. It demands to be served ice-cold, ideally with a squeeze of fresh lime to accentuate its crisp, thirst-quenching simplicity.

name: Foster Oil Can
tastingNotes: Characterized by its iconic oversized packaging, this Australian-style lager delivers a straightforward, malt-forward sweetness with a subdued hop presence. It finishes with a clean, highly carbonated snap, providing effortless refreshment for warm climates.
description: Characterized by its iconic oversized packaging, this Australian-style lager delivers a straightforward, malt-forward sweetness with a subdued hop presence. It finishes with a clean, highly carbonated snap, providing effortless refreshment for warm climates.

name: Guinness Extra Stout 6 Pack
tastingNotes: Tracing its lineage back to the original archives of St. James's Gate, this robust stout is a masterclass in roasted barley, offering profound notes of dark cocoa, espresso, and subtle caramel. It possesses a sharp, biting hop character that balances the rich malt, culminating in a deeply satisfying, bone-dry finish.
description: Tracing its lineage back to the original archives of St. James's Gate, this robust stout is a masterclass in roasted barley, offering profound notes of dark cocoa, espresso, and subtle caramel. It possesses a sharp, biting hop character that balances the rich malt, culminating in a deeply satisfying, bone-dry finish.

name: Heineken 12 Pck Bott
tastingNotes: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Its signature green bottle often imparts a subtle skunked nuance that has become intimately associated with its globally recognized flavor profile.
description: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Its signature green bottle often imparts a subtle skunked nuance that has become intimately associated with its globally recognized flavor profile.

name: Heineken 12 Pk Cans
tastingNotes: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Protected from light in its aluminum vessel, the brew maintains a pristine, beautifully balanced bitterness from the first sip to the last.
description: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Protected from light in its aluminum vessel, the brew maintains a pristine, beautifully balanced bitterness from the first sip to the last.

name: Heineken 6pk Bott
tastingNotes: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Its signature green bottle often imparts a subtle skunked nuance that has become intimately associated with its globally recognized flavor profile.
description: Brewed with the proprietary A-Yeast discovered in 19th-century Amsterdam, this quintessential European pale lager offers a distinctively crisp, slightly fruity malt foundation. Its signature green bottle often imparts a subtle skunked nuance that has become intimately associated with its globally recognized flavor profile.

name: Johnnie Walker Black
tastingNotes: Sourced from the four corners of Scotland and aged for a minimum of 12 years, this masterful blend orchestrates rich notes of dark fruit, creamy vanilla, and a signature shroud of gentle Islay smoke. The palate is extraordinarily complex yet perfectly balanced, finishing with a lingering, warming peat that defines its enduring legacy.
description: Sourced from the four corners of Scotland and aged for a minimum of 12 years, this masterful blend orchestrates rich notes of dark fruit, creamy vanilla, and a signature shroud of gentle Islay smoke. The palate is extraordinarily complex yet perfectly balanced, finishing with a lingering, warming peat that defines its enduring legacy.

name: New Amsterdam Gin
tastingNotes: Departing from the traditional London Dry style, this modern American gin softens the juniper presence to allow bright, sweet citrus and subtle floral botanicals to shine. Its uniquely crisp and exceptionally smooth texture makes it an incredibly versatile canvas for both classic and inventive contemporary cocktails.
description: Departing from the traditional London Dry style, this modern American gin softens the juniper presence to allow bright, sweet citrus and subtle floral botanicals to shine. Its uniquely crisp and exceptionally smooth texture makes it an incredibly versatile canvas for both classic and inventive contemporary cocktails.

name: Negra Modelo 6 Pks
tastingNotes: Drawing inspiration from 19th-century Austrian brewing traditions brought to Mexico, this dark, copper-hued lager weaves inviting aromas of toasted caramel, toffee, and roasted nuts. Its medium body provides a surprisingly smooth, subtly sweet malt richness that finishes with a gentle, balancing hop crispness.
description: Drawing inspiration from 19th-century Austrian brewing traditions brought to Mexico, this dark, copper-hued lager weaves inviting aromas of toasted caramel, toffee, and roasted nuts. Its medium body provides a surprisingly smooth, subtly sweet malt richness that finishes with a gentle, balancing hop crispness.

name: Jack Daniel Honey
tastingNotes: This sweet expression marries the iconic, charcoal-mellowed character of Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey with a proprietary honey liqueur. The resulting profile bursts with natural honeycomb, roasted nuts, and vanilla, offering a delightfully smooth, lingering sweetness perfect for sipping chilled over ice.
description: This sweet expression marries the iconic, charcoal-mellowed character of Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey with a proprietary honey liqueur. The resulting profile bursts with natural honeycomb, roasted nuts, and vanilla, offering a delightfully smooth, lingering sweetness perfect for sipping chilled over ice.

name: Belvedere Vodka
tastingNotes: Distilled entirely from Dankowskie Gold Rye and pure artesian water, this prestigious Polish spirit epitomizes vodka elegance with a faint vanilla nose and a velvety, full-bodied texture. The palate gently transitions from subtle sweetness to a refined, white-pepper spice, leaving a pristine and crisp finish.
description: Distilled entirely from Dankowskie Gold Rye and pure artesian water, this prestigious Polish spirit epitomizes vodka elegance with a faint vanilla nose and a velvety, full-bodied texture. The palate gently transitions from subtle sweetness to a refined, white-pepper spice, leaving a pristine and crisp finish.

name: Stones Ginger Wine
tastingNotes: Originally formulated in London in 1740, this historic fortified wine boasts a potent, warming infusion of premium ground ginger and plump raisins. It delivers a rich, syrupy mouthfeel brimming with fiery spice and dark treacle notes, traditionally enjoyed neat to ward off the cold or mixed into a Whisky Mac.
description: Originally formulated in London in 1740, this historic fortified wine boasts a potent, warming infusion of premium ground ginger and plump raisins. It delivers a rich, syrupy mouthfeel brimming with fiery spice and dark treacle notes, traditionally enjoyed neat to ward off the cold or mixed into a Whisky Mac.

name: Spaten Oktoberfest 6pk Bott
tastingNotes: Created in 1872 as the world’s first official Oktoberfest beer, this amber-hued Märzen offers a rich, bready malt foundation redolent of toasted biscuit and light caramel. Its luscious, medium-bodied sweetness is expertly counterbalanced by a restrained Noble hop bitterness, ensuring a clean and endlessly drinkable finish.
description: Created in 1872 as the world’s first official Oktoberfest beer, this amber-hued Märzen offers a rich, bready malt foundation redolent of toasted biscuit and light caramel. Its luscious, medium-bodied sweetness is expertly counterbalanced by a restrained Noble hop bitterness, ensuring a clean and endlessly drinkable finish.
